text: Standing in this dim, sterile hallway, I feel a strange mix of isolation and curiosity. The artificial lighting casts harsh reflections on the glass while the overall emptiness evokes a sense of abandonment—yet just beyond these doors, the presence of 'R+D' hints at a space dedicated to progress and discovery. I am both unsettled by the quiet and intrigued by what lies within, suspended between discomfort and anticipation.
